scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.setup:frontend: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('frontend/node_modules')) { console.log('frontend dependencies already installed'); process.exit(0); } process.exit(1);" || npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: bash -lc 'cd backend && poetry run uvicorn main:app --reload --port 7001 & npm --prefix frontend run dev'
